tags.target_object: Lie bracket of transformed Killing vectors
tags.method: coordinate transformation and Lie bracket bilinearity

origin.question: Consider a stationary axisymmetric spacetime of a rotating star, which admits two Killing vectors representing time translation and axial rotation: $\xi_{(t)} = \partial_t$ and $\xi_{(\phi)} = \partial_\phi$. It is a fundamental theorem in general relativity that these two Killing vectors commute, i.e., $[\xi_{(t)}, \xi_{(\phi)}] = 0$. In the study of such spacetimes, we frequently introduce a co-rotating coordinate frame to analyze relative motion, defined by a constant angular velocity $\Omega$ with the transformation: $\tilde{t} = t$, $\tilde{\phi} = \phi - \Omega t$, while keeping the other spatial coordinates unchanged. The new metric remains stationary and axisymmetric, admitting new Killing vectors $\tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{t})} = \partial_{\tilde{t}}$ and $\tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{\phi})} = \partial_{\tilde{\phi}}$. Verify the invariance (symmetry) of the commutation property under this coordinate transformation by proving that the new Killing vectors also commute, i.e., $[\tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{t})}, \tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{\phi})}] = 0$.
origin.solution: 1. 根据坐标变换 $\tilde{t} = t$ 和 $\tilde{\phi} = \phi - \Omega t$，求出原坐标对新坐标的偏导数：$t = \tilde{t}$，$\phi = \tilde{\phi} + \Omega \tilde{t}$。2. 将新坐标系下的 Killing 矢量用原坐标基表示：   $\tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{t})} = \frac{\partial t}{\partial \tilde{t}} \frac{\partial}{\partial t} + \frac{\partial \phi}{\partial \tilde{t}} \frac{\partial}{\partial \phi} = \xi_{(t)} + \Omega \xi_{(\phi)}$   $\tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{\phi})} = \frac{\partial t}{\partial \tilde{\phi}} \frac{\partial}{\partial t} + \frac{\partial \phi}{\partial \tilde{\phi}} \frac{\partial}{\partial \phi} = \xi_{(\phi)}$3. 计算两者的李括号，利用李括号的线性性质：   $[\tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{t})}, \tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{\phi})}] = [\xi_{(t)} + \Omega \xi_{(\phi)}, \xi_{(\phi)}] = [\xi_{(t)}, \xi_{(\phi)}] + \Omega [\xi_{(\phi)}, \xi_{(\phi)}]$4. 代入已知定理 $[\xi_{(t)}, \xi_{(\phi)}] = 0$ 以及任何矢量场与自身的李括恒为零的性质 $[\xi_{(\phi)}, \xi_{(\phi)}] = 0$，得到：   $[\tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{t})}, \tilde{\xi}_{(\tilde{\phi})}] = 0 + \Omega \cdot 0 = 0$5. 这验证了 Killing 矢量的对易性质在共旋坐标变换下保持不变。物理上，这意味着时空的等距群结构（Abelian $R \times U(1)$ 群）与观察者参考系的选择无关，共旋系下对应的新守恒量依然可以同时确定。
